Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I have thought about it many times. And other possibilités beside. I am not sure what I did to have you assume that I am ignorant of it.

Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: Perhaps some of it is deserved. Perhaps I have been moping, like you say.

Line.Text: But do not presume that you know my life after trois rencontres. Or that mes problèmes are as easily fixed as you imply.
